name: Gumdrop Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Small Gumdrops, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat all ingredients except gumdrops and nuts in a large mixer bowl on low speed for 15 seconds.
2. Beat on medium speed, scraping the bowl constantly, for an additional 30 seconds.
3. Stir in the gumdrops and chopped nuts.
4. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 5 inch loaf pan (grease only the bottom).
5. Bake at 350°F for 60 to 65 minutes, or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Loosen the sides of the loaf from the pan and remove it from the pan. Cool completely on a wire rack.
7. For best results, wrap the bread tightly and refrigerate for at least 24 hours before slicing. Refrigerate no longer than one week.
